nodes.speaker: Victor
nodes.text: I remembered a room. I wish I hadn't.

choices.text: You don't have to say it all.

nodes.speaker: Victor
nodes.text: A table. A drawing. And someone pretending not to be afraid.

nodes.speaker: Victor
nodes.text: I know. It still hurts when I stop pretending.

nodes.speaker: Victor
nodes.text: Yes. They told me not to look back.

nodes.speaker: Victor
nodes.text: If I remember more later, I will tell you. I just need a minute first.
